# Inert document-threat fixtures

`test_document_threats.py` generates each PDF fixture in memory with `pypdf`: minimal, URI, JavaScript, OpenAction, Additional Actions, Launch, AcroForm/XFA, attachments (text, executable-like, double extension), IP-literal and unsafe URIs, sensitive query values, encryption, malformed/signature-invalid input, nested sensitive metadata, signature markers, and multiple EOF/incremental-update samples.

No fixture contains malware, exploit code, live credentials, or an active payload. Generated bytes are never written to this directory.
